mapper.sql: id, table_code, table_name, module, entity_class, service_class, permission_code, page_size, is_tree, status, remarks, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, has_data_permission, permission_field, permission_scope
mapper.select:
select
from sys_table_meta where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select
from sys_table_meta where table_code = #{tableCode} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
update sys_table_meta
table_code = #{tableCode},
table_name = #{tableName},
module = #{module},
entity_class = #{entityClass},
service_class = #{serviceClass},
permission_code = #{permissionCode},
page_size = #{pageSize},
is_tree = #{isTree},
status = #{status},
remarks = #{remarks},
has_data_permission = #{hasDataPermission},
permission_field = #{permissionField},
permission_scope = #{permissionScope},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
update sys_table_meta set is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{username}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_table_meta set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
select
from sys_table_meta where is_deleted = 0 order by id asc

select
from sys_table_meta where table_code = #{tableCode} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select count(1) from sys_column_meta where table_id = #{tableId} and is_deleted = 0
